message:
docs: add zsh to pipe-to-interpreter patterns

The shell inline pattern (line 89) includes zsh, but the pipe-to-
interpreter pattern was missing it. If we protect against `zsh -c`
we should also protect against `| zsh`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -87,7 +87,7 @@ Triggers (RegexSet):
 - `<<<` (here-strings)
 - `\b(python3?|ruby|perl|node)\s+-[ce]\s` (inline scripts)
 - `\b(sh|bash|zsh)\s+-c\s` (shell inline)
-- `\|\s*(python3?|ruby|perl|node|sh|bash)\b` (pipe to interpreter)
+- `\|\s*(python3?|ruby|perl|node|sh|bash|zsh)\b` (pipe to interpreter)
 
 Budget: <100μs
 Guarantees: ZERO false negatives for supported forms

@@ -140,7 +140,7 @@ They're only evaluated when:
 |----|---------|----------|---------|
 | rm_rf | `rm -rf $PATH` (non-temp) | Critical | Medium |
 | git_destructive | destructive git commands | Critical | Low |
-| destructive_pipe | `| sh`, `| bash` | High | Medium |
+| destructive_pipe | `| sh`, `| bash`, `| zsh` | High | Medium |
 
 ### JavaScript (heredoc.javascript)
